overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a witch character exploring a gothic castle courtyard at dusk. The character walks through stone-paved grounds, ascends multiple staircases, and explores upper terraces while other robed students walk about. The environment features detailed medieval architecture, atmospheric lighting, and autumnal trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard with circular stone plaza

events.description: robed student walks past from right to left in the foreground
character passes another student walking in the same direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the castle courtyard toward the main building

notable_agents.action: robed student walking across the path from right to left

entered.detail: large stone cathedral-like structure with multiple spires and flying buttresses
wet reflective stone tiles with circular geometric patterns
ornate carved stone seating along the courtyard walls
lit Victorian-style street lamps along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the open castle courtyard toward the main gothic building. The stone pavement features circular patterns, and other robed students walk about the area. Lantern posts line the path, and the dusk sky casts a purple hue over the autumnal trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle entrance approach with grand staircase

events.description: beginning ascent of the wide stone staircase toward the castle entrance
reaching the top of the stairs and turning left onto the upper terrace

agents.ego_description: walking up the grand stone stairs toward the castle entrance

notable_agents.action: student in robes walking ahead up the stairs

entered.detail: wide stone steps with ornate carved balustrades on the sides
gothic arched openings along the castle facade

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand stone staircase leading to the castle entrance. Stone balustrades line the steps, and another student walks ahead. The camera follows the ascent, reaching the top where the character turns left onto an upper terrace.

events.description: turning left to walk along the upper terrace walkway
approaching the large creature statue in the center of the terrace

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper terrace past arched walkways and stone railings

entered.detail: large stone sculpture of a werewolf-like creature on a circular pedestal
trimmed cone-shaped topiary in ornate stone planters
crenellated stone defensive walls with spires

segments.scene_description: Walking along the upper castle terrace, the character passes gothic archways and potted shrubs. The large creature statue becomes visible ahead, standing on a circular pedestal. The stone walkway continues alongside the castle battlements with mountains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle wall walkway with ascending stairs

events.description: circling around the creature statue to approach the side stairs
beginning ascent of the secondary stone staircase along the wall

agents.ego_description: walking up the side stairs along the castle wall toward higher levels

entered.detail: steep stone staircase ascending along the castle wall with lantern posts
distant mountain peaks visible beyond the castle walls

segments.scene_description: The character circles around the creature statue and approaches a secondary stone staircase. Ascending the stairs along the castle wall, the path becomes narrower with crenellated battlements on the left. The character continues upward toward higher levels of the castle with mountain views in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open expanse of a gothic castle courtyard up toward the narrow, elevated battlements of the fortress. It begins by tracking the character across stone-paved grounds under a purple dusk sky, passing lantern posts and other robed students. As the character reaches the main building, the camera follows an ascent up a grand stone staircase and turns left onto an upper terrace lined with gothic archways and potted shrubs. The scene then expands to reveal a large creature statue on a circular pedestal, with the walkway opening up to show distant mountains beyond the castle walls. Finally, the camera circles the statue and climbs a secondary, narrower staircase along the crenellated battlements, moving steadily upward toward the highest levels of the castle.
